title: vicia terronii
intro: Vicia terronii, also known as the Narrow-leaved Vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vicia terronii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases, and promote digestion. Vicia terronii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some regions also using it in traditional medicine formulations to treat various health conditions.
